name: Memory External Reranker
description: OpenClaw memory reranker plugin that proxies to a Cohere-compatible /v1/rerank endpoint (Cohere, Jina, Voyage, llama.cpp).

provider.label: Provider
provider.help: Provider ID — must match a key in models.providers in your OpenClaw config

model.label: Model
model.help: Model ID sent in the rerank request body

modelFallbacks.label: Model Fallbacks
modelFallbacks.help: Ordered list of alternate model IDs (same provider) tried on failure

endpointPath.label: Endpoint Path
endpointPath.help: HTTP path appended to the provider baseUrl (default '/v1/rerank')

topN.label: Top N
topN.help: Maximum number of results returned by the rerank endpoint

additionalBodyParams.label: Additional Body Params
additionalBodyParams.help: Extra key/value pairs merged into the rerank request body (e.g. max_chunks_per_doc, truncation)
